author: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice
book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice.
The Canons of the CCXVII Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage. Commonly Called The Code of Canons of the African Church.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

title: Canon CVII.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: A Council concerning a bishop taking cognizance.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: In the consulate of the most glorious Emperors Honorius for the VIIth time and Theodosius for the IIId, Augusti, xvii.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Calends of July, a synod was held at Carthage in the basilica of the second region.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: In this council it seemed good that no one bishop should claim the right to take cognizance of a cause.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: The acts of this council I have not here written down, because it was only provincial and not general.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: One bishop shall not claim for himself to take cognizance of a cause alone.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: After the consulate of the most illustrious Emperors Honorius for the VIIIth time and Theodosius for the IVth time, Augusti, xviii.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Calends of July, at Carthage in the basilica of the second region.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: In this council the bishops, Florentius, Possidius, Præsidius and Benenatus received legation against the Donatists, at that time at which a law was given that anyone might practice the Christian worship at his own will.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Let each one receive the practice of piety of his own free will.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: The two first introductions belong respectively to the Synods of Carthage of June 16 and of October 13, a.d.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Canon cvij. of the African code and that which follows it are the introductions to the Synods of Carthage of June 15, a.d.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Recognises, a law of the Empire, that everyone receive christianity at his own free choice.
